intended_use: EchoGo Pro v1.0.2 is a machine learning-based decision support system, indicated as an adjunct to diagnostic stress echocardiography for patients undergoing assessment for coronary artery disease (CAD
intended_use_full: EchoGo Pro v1.0.2 is a machine learning-based decision support system, indicated as an adjunct to diagnostic stress echocardiography for patients undergoing assessment for coronary artery disease (CAD). When utilized by an interpreting physician, this device provides information that may be useful in rendering an accurate diagnosis.
ground_truth: Invasive coronary angiography performed within 6 months of stress echocardiogram, with significant CAD defined as ≥70% stenosis in proximal to mid LAD, proximal left circumflex, or proximal to mid RCA
other_metrics: Reader performance improvement (AUROC difference) of 0.054 (95% CI 0.032, 0.077) at p=0.02; Kendall Tau-B inter-rater agreement USE+EGP 0.82 (95% CI 0.72, 0.93) vs USE Alone 0.58 (95% CI 0.48, 0.69); p<0.001
